attributes.action: Get the doctors back into empty surgeries. All surgeries are constantly empty
attributes.additional_details: I want the Government to get to get Doctors back into surgeries. Doctors can spot health problems in people that the patient knows nothing about. Doctors are brilliant at putting people at ease, give them hope but its not the same during phone call consultations. Making people wait, sometimes up to 4 weeks for a face to face consultation. People suffering from mental health issues or feel they have a serious health issue is detrimental to their well being. Get or Doctors back behind their desk.
attributes.background: To get doctors back behind their desks. I was in my surgery recently and it was empty. I took a video on tiktok and it has racked up thousands of views and 99.9% of the comments all said they had the same problem. We cant keep going on waiting weeks to see a Dr

rejection.details:
Your petition is about something that the Scottish Government and Scottish Parliament is responsible for. That means that the UK Government and Parliament can't look into it. 

The Scottish Parliament has its own Public Petitions Committee. If you'd like to send your petition to the Scottish Parliament, you can find out more here: https://petitions.parliament.scot/

You may also wish to contact your local council and MSP who represent you about this issue. 

You can find the name of your local council and how to contact them here: https://www.mygov.scot/find-your-local-council

You can find the name of your local MSP and how to contact them here: https://www.parliament.scot/msps
